findings.message: Breaking schema change: renamed 'name' field to 'title' without backwards compatibility. Existing clients querying Item.name will fail.
findings.suggestion: To maintain backwards compatibility, keep the 'name' field as a deprecated alias to 'title', or add a deprecation directive with a migration period. Example: add @strawberry.field with a deprecation_reason parameter, or alias 'name' to 'title' with @strawberry.field(name='name').
